title: kuba's tfc additions
description: Mod which tries to enrich terrafirmacraft's food
body:
Have you ever thought that eating sandwiches trough your entire game is boring?

This mod aims to fix that by adding more ways increase your nutrition such as more soup additions and pemmican which will allow you to spare some meat for harder times.

It will also allow you to relive the caveman's experience of trying new herbs, gather plants and test which one are edible!



at the moment the mod includes:

pasta
poppy roll
dumplings
pemmican
teas
meat canning
sunflower crop

discord is prefered form of communication(tfc discord -> content->kubastfca)
